metadata.description: Comprehensive US standards knowledge base for sign engineering

standards.name: ASCE 7-22
standards.full_title: Minimum Design Loads and Associated Criteria for Buildings and Other Structures
standards.sign_relevance: Primary wind load standard. Ch 29 for monument/pylon MWFRS, Ch 30 for blade/cabinet C&C. 2022 edition adds tornado provisions (Ch 32). Exposure categories B/C/D, topographic factors, directionality.

standards.name: IBC 2024
standards.sign_relevance: Primary building code for sign permitting. Appendix H covers sign-specific structural/electrical/fire. Section 1807.3.1 simplified lateral pier formula (wood posts, NOT concrete caissons). Ch 16 load combos reference ASCE 7. Most jurisdictions adopt IBC with local amendments.

standards.name: AASHTO LRFD-LTS (1st Ed)
standards.full_title: LRFD Specifications for Structural Supports for Highway Signs, Luminaires, and Traffic Signals
standards.sign_relevance: Highway sign support standard. LRFD methodology. Applies to signs in right-of-way. Chapter 3 wind provisions differ from ASCE 7 (drag coefficients Cd for sign panels). Foundation design in Ch 13 uses Broms method. First edition supersedes AASHTO LTS-6 (ASD).

standards.name: AASHTO MASH
standards.sign_relevance: Crashworthiness standard for roadside sign supports. Required for signs within clear zone of highways. Breakaway support testing. FHWA Letter CC-73A eligibility. Supersedes NCHRP 350.

standards.name: AISC 360-22

key_sections.topic: Design of Members for Flexure (F7 for HSS)
Design of Connections (Bolts, Welds, Base Plates)

standards.sign_relevance: Steel design standard for HSS tube, W-shapes, angles used in sign structures. Chapter F Section F7 governs square/rectangular HSS flexure. Chapter H interaction equations for combined wind+gravity. Chapter J for baseplate and anchor bolt design. Eagle Sign prefers HSS over round pipe.

standards.name: ACI 318-19
standards.full_title: Building Code Requirements for Structural Concrete

key_sections.topic: Tie Spacing (16 x db longitudinal bar diameter)

standards.sign_relevance: Concrete foundation design for sign piers/caissons. Section 14.3.6.3.1 mandates 0.5% Ag minimum steel for drilled shafts. Ch 17 for anchor bolt embedment and breakout capacity. Ch 25 for rebar development lengths and minimum cover (3" for cast against earth).

standards.name: TMS 402/602-22
standards.full_title: Building Code Requirements and Specification for Masonry Structures
standards.sign_relevance: Masonry monument base design. CMU block walls with grout-filled cells around sign supports. Applies when monument base uses structural masonry veneer or full-depth masonry. Mortar types M/S for structural applications.

standards.name: ADM 2020
standards.sign_relevance: Aluminum extrusion and sheet design for sign cabinets, channel letter returns, and blade sign frames. 6061-T6 and 6063-T5 most common alloys. Fatigue provisions critical for wind-loaded aluminum sign components.

standards.name: AWS D1.1
standards.sign_relevance: Weld design and fabrication standard for sign structures. Clause 9 specifically addresses tubular (HSS) connections. Fillet weld sizing per applied loads. CJP welds at baseplate-to-post connections. Most sign welds are Clause 8 (static) unless fatigue governs.

standards.name: NEC 2026 / NFPA 70
standards.sign_relevance: Primary electrical code for all illuminated signs. Article 600 is THE sign-specific article. Requires UL listing (UL 48), dedicated 20A branch circuit, disconnect within sight, proper grounding. Section 600.32/33 added for LED systems.

standards.name: UL 48
standards.sign_relevance: UL listing standard for electric signs. Required by NEC Article 600. Covers construction, wiring, performance testing. UL label must be visible on installed sign. Applies to all illuminated signs regardless of light source type.

standards.name: UL 879 / UL 879A
standards.full_title: Standard for Electrode Receptacles and Electrode Receptacle Assemblies / LED Sign and Sign Retrofit Kits
standards.sign_relevance: UL 879 covers neon electrode receptacles (GTO housings). UL 879A covers LED sign illumination modules and retrofit kits for converting neon to LED. Most new signs use UL 879A-listed LED modules.

standards.name: UL 969
standards.full_title: Standard for Marking and Labeling Systems
standards.sign_relevance: Standard for marking and labeling systems used on signs. Covers vinyl graphics, decals, nameplates. UL 969 recognition ensures markings survive outdoor exposure. Required for UL-labeled sign nameplate adhesion.

standards.name: ASME Y14.5-2018
standards.sign_relevance: Primary dimensioning standard. Governs dimension placement, extension line gaps, spacing between parallel dimensions, leader usage. GD&T for critical mating surfaces (baseplate holes, anchor bolt patterns). Most sign drawings use basic dimensioning (Section 5) without full GD&T.

standards.name: ASME Y14.2-2023

key_sections.topic: Dimension Line Terminators (Tick Marks vs Arrowheads)

standards.sign_relevance: Defines line weights (thick/medium/thin), leader conventions (30-60 degree angle, never horizontal/vertical), and lettering standards. Section 3.2.2 allows tick marks as dimension terminators (structural convention used by SignX). Section 4 governs leader shelf placement.

standards.name: ASME Y14.3-2012(R2023)

key_sections.topic: Arrangement of Views (Front, Top, Right Side)

standards.sign_relevance: Governs view arrangement and section hatching on sign drawings. Section 5 defines material-specific hatch patterns (ANSI31 for concrete, ANSI32 for steel). Adjacent same-material sections use mirrored angle (45/135). Foundation section views follow Section 4 conventions.

standards.name: ASME Y14.41-2019
standards.sign_relevance: Standard for 3D model-based definition. Relevant for DXF/DWG/STEP deliverables where PMI (Product Manufacturing Information) is embedded in 3D models rather than 2D drawings. Future direction for sign fabrication drawings.

standards.name: ASME Y14.100-2024
standards.sign_relevance: Master standard governing overall drawing practices. Title block requirements, revision tracking (triangle symbol), general notes placement, BOM format. All sign engineering drawings should conform to Y14.100 for general practices.

standards.name: ASME Y14.1-2020
standards.full_title: Decimal Inch Drawing Sheet Size and Format
standards.sign_relevance: Defines ANSI sheet sizes. Sign drawings typically use ANSI D (22x34) or ANSI C (17x22). Title block zone placement. Border line weights. Zoning for large multi-view drawings.

standards.name: ASME Y14.34-2020
standards.sign_relevance: Governs BOM/parts list format on sign drawings. Item balloons, quantity columns, material callouts. Used for sign component breakdowns (poles, panels, fasteners, electrical components).

standards.name: ASME Y14.36M
standards.sign_relevance: Surface finish specification for machined sign components (baseplates, milled aluminum faces). Ra callouts on critical bearing surfaces. Generally applies to CNC-machined components, not fabricated sheet/tube.

standards.name: ASME Y14.5.1-2019
standards.full_title: Mathematical Definition of Dimensioning and Tolerancing Principles
standards.sign_relevance: Mathematical companion to Y14.5. Defines rigorous tolerance zone math for CNC and CMM verification. Applicable when sign components require precision machining (anchor bolt patterns, mating surfaces).

standards.name: ASME Y14.43-2011(R2021)
standards.full_title: Dimensioning and Tolerancing Principles for Gages and Fixtures
standards.sign_relevance: Gage and fixture tolerancing for sign manufacturing QC. Applicable when fabrication jigs are used for repetitive sign production (anchor bolt templates, baseplate drilling jigs).

standards.name: ASME Y14.8-2022
standards.sign_relevance: Drawing practices for cast sign components (decorative bases, ornamental brackets). Draft angles, parting line indication, machining stock allowance specification.

standards.name: ASME Y14.46
standards.sign_relevance: Additive manufacturing drawing practices. Emerging relevance for 3D-printed sign components (decorative elements, custom letterforms, LED housings). Build orientation and surface finish callouts.

standards.name: AWS A2.4:2020
standards.full_title: Standard Symbols for Welding, Brazing, and Nondestructive Examination

key_sections.topic: Welding Symbol Components (Arrow, Reference Line, Tail)

standards.sign_relevance: Weld symbol standard for sign fabrication drawings. Fillet weld sizing (3/16 min for structural, 1/4 typical for HSS-to-baseplate). CJP symbols at critical baseplate connections. Field weld flag for site-installed components. All-around symbol for continuous perimeter welds.

standards.name: NCS V7
standards.sign_relevance: National layer naming standard. Format: Discipline-Major-Minor-Status (e.g., S-SIGN-DIMS). Disciplines: S=Structural, C=Civil, E=Electrical, A=Architectural. Used for DXF layer naming in SignX drawing output.

standards.name: ADA 2010

key_sections.topic: Protruding Objects (4" max below 27" AFF, 12" max above 27" AFF)

standards.sign_relevance: Accessibility standard for signs on accessible routes. Section 307 limits protruding sign elements. Section 703 governs wayfinding sign character height, contrast, and tactile requirements. Section 703.5 specifies minimum character height based on viewing distance. Monument signs near pedestrian paths must comply.

standards.name: MUTCD 11th Edition
standards.full_title: Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices
standards.sign_relevance: FHWA standard for traffic control signs. Governs height, setback, retroreflectivity for signs in right-of-way. 11th Edition (2023) is current. Applies to directional and wayfinding signs visible from public roads. Retroreflectivity requirements affect sign face material selection.

standards.name: OSHA 1926.200
standards.sign_relevance: OSHA construction safety sign requirements. Applies during sign installation on construction sites. Danger, caution, and safety instruction sign specifications. Not directly about sign products but governs signage used during sign installation projects.

standards.name: OSHA 1910.145
standards.full_title: Specifications for Accident Prevention Signs and Tags (General Industry)
standards.sign_relevance: General industry safety sign specifications. Applies to safety signs fabricated by sign companies for client facilities. Color coding (red=danger, yellow=caution, green=safety). ANSI Z535 series provides more detailed guidance.

standards.name: MIL-STD-31000B
standards.sign_relevance: Military/government TDP standard. Applies when fabricating signs for federal/DOD facilities. Specifies complete technical data package format including drawings, specs, and quality requirements. STEP AP242 for 3D deliverables.

standards.name: AASHTO M 268
standards.full_title: Standard Specification for Aluminum Overhead Sign Structures
standards.sign_relevance: AASHTO material specification for aluminum overhead sign structures. Covers alloy requirements, fabrication tolerances, weld procedures for aluminum sign supports. Applies to highway overhead sign structures.

standards.name: AASHTO M 120
standards.full_title: Standard Specification for Zinc (Hot-Dip Galvanized) Coatings on Iron and Steel Products
standards.sign_relevance: Hot-dip galvanizing specification for steel sign components. Governs zinc coating thickness and quality for corrosion protection. Most steel sign poles and structures are hot-dip galvanized per this standard (or ASTM A123 equivalent).

ANSI31.description: 45-degree diagonal lines - standard section hatch for concrete and masonry

ANSI32.description: Double diagonal lines for steel sections

ANSI33.description: Diagonal lines with alternating spacing for brass, bronze, and copper sections

EARTH.description: Earth fill pattern with irregular short lines

AR-CONC.description: AutoCAD proprietary concrete pattern with random aggregates - DEPRECATED, use ANSI31 for cross-platform compatibility and matplotlib preview rendering

AR-SAND.description: AutoCAD proprietary sand pattern - NOT suitable for steel sections, use ANSI32 instead

GRAVEL.description: Gravel fill pattern with rounded aggregate shapes

GRATE.description: Perforated/grated metal panel pattern with crossed lines

layers.S-SIGN-ANNO-SYMB: Weld symbols, section cuts, north arrows

signx_current.note: Current SignX layer names for backward compatibility
